case_title: DASHIELL, JANET vs. NGUYEN, KHOA TRONG et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DASHIELL, JANET AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, KHOA TRONG DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-04-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-05-1999 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-17-1999
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-11-1999, OFF CALENDAR
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-11-1999 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-04-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR DEFAULT; OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY TIMOTHY A GILL HEARING SET FOR JUL-14-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-14-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUL-14-1999, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. SANCTIONS AND OSC DIRECTED TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY TIMOTHY A. GILL, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-29-1999 CONTINUED FROM JUL-14-1999 TO SEP-01-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
